<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Cherry - Messages</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
:root {
    --bg-dark: #0b1020;
    --primary: #6f5cff;
    --secondary: #c084fc;
    --accent: #22d3ee;
    --glass-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(28, 37, 66, 0.96) 0%, rgba(21, 29, 54, 0.98) 100%);
    --glass-border: rgba(141, 156, 201, 0.18);
    --text-main: #edf1ff;
    --text-muted: #8e98b8;
    --panel-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(5, 10, 28, 0.42);
    --bubble-assistant: transparent;
    --bubble-user: linear-gradient(135deg, #6c63ff 0%, #7c6dff 100%);
    --composer-bg: transparent;
    --font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
}

html {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
}

html::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
}

* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: var(--font-family);
    background-color: var(--bg-dark);
    color: var(--text-main);
    overflow: hidden;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100vh;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
}

body::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
}

/* reused background animations */
.background-globes {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    z-index: -1;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.globe {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 50%;
    filter: blur(90px);
    opacity: 0.2;
    animation: floatGlobe 20s infinite alternate ease-in-out;
}

.globe-1 {
    width: 500px;
    height: 500px;
    background: var(--primary);
    top: -10%;
    left: -10%;
}

.globe-2 {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    background: var(--secondary);
    bottom: -10%;
    right: -5%;
    animation-delay: -5s;
}

.globe-3 {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    background: var(--accent);
    top: 40%;
    left: 40%;
    opacity: 0.4;
    animation-delay: -10s;
}

@keyframes floatGlobe {
    0% {
        transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1);
    }

    100% {
        transform: translate(30px, 50px) scale(1.1);
    }
}

.main-container {
    display: flex;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 600px;
    height: 90vh;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto;
    overflow: hidden;
    min-height: 0;
}

/* Character Section (Deprecated/Removed from HTML flow, styles repurposed) */
.character-section {
    display: none;
}

/* Chat Layout Wrapper */
.chat-layout {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: flex-start;
    /* Align to top */
    gap: 15px;
    flex: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    /* Prevent overflow */
    min-height: 0;
    /* Critical for flex scrolling */
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.character-container {
    width: 60px;
    /* Small icon size */
    height: 60px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    /* Subtle glowing backdrop */
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
}

.character-img {
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 50%;
    /* Circle avatar */
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3));
    transform-origin: center;
}

.floating-anim {
    animation: none;
    /* Disable float for avatar style */
}

/* Conversation Flow */
.conversation-flow {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 15px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding-right: 5px;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
}

.conversation-flow::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
}

/* Message Wrapper */
.message-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 16px;
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 0;
}

.avatar {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
    box-shadow: none;
}

.avatar img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
}

/* 3D Bubble Style for Current Step */
.current-step {
    background: var(--bubble-assistant);
    border: none;
    padding: 0 8px 0 0;
    margin-top: 0;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    max-height: min(44vh, 380px);
    overflow-y: auto;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    padding-right: 8px;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
    overscroll-behavior: auto;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    border-radius: 0;
    box-shadow: none;
}

.current-step::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
}

/* Typing Effect in Bubble */
.current-step h2 {
    font-size: 1.18rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.48;
    background: none;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: var(--text-main);
    color: var(--text-main);
    animation: none;
    letter-spacing: 0;
}

@keyframes lookAround {

    0%,
    100% {
        transform: rotateY(0deg) scale(1);
        /* Front Smile */
    }

    20% {
        transform: rotateY(0deg) scale(1.03);
        /* Subtle bounce/smile emphasis */
    }

    35% {
        transform: rotateY(-12deg) scale(1);
        /* Look Left */
    }

    50% {
        transform: rotateY(0deg) scale(1);
        /* Center */
    }

    65% {
        transform: rotateY(12deg) scale(1);
        /* Look Right */
    }

    80% {
        transform: rotateY(0deg) scale(1.03);
        /* Front Smile Emphasis */
    }
}

/* Form Interface */
.form-interface {
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 600px;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 28px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto auto;
    box-shadow: var(--panel-shadow);
    padding: 18px 18px 10px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 20;
    min-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.form-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 30;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(21, 29, 54, 0.98) 0%, rgba(21, 29, 54, 0.94) 78%, rgba(21, 29, 54, 0) 100%);
    padding: 2px 2px 12px;
}

.brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
}

.status-dot {
    width: 9px;
    height: 9px;
    background: #10b981;
    border-radius: 50%;
    box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.9);
}

.form-header h1 {
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #d6dcef;
}

.header-actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
}

.settings-btn {
    width: auto;
    height: auto;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    color: #b6c0dd;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.settings-btn:hover {
    color: #eef2ff;
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
}

/* Conversation Flow */
.conversation-flow {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    /* Center content vertically */
    gap: 18px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding-top: 8px;
    padding-right: 4px;
    padding-bottom: 6px;
    scroll-padding-top: 88px;
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    min-height: 0;
    height: 100%;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
}

/* History Items */
.history-item {
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
    border-left: 2px solid rgba(111, 92, 255, 0.9);
    padding-left: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.history-q {
    display: block;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    max-height: 200px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding-right: 5px;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
    line-height: 1.42;
}

.history-q::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
}

.history-a {
    display: block;
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #e8ebff;
    background: transparent;
    border-radius: 0;
    padding: 0;
    width: auto;
    max-width: none;
    box-shadow: none;
}

/* Current Question */
.current-step h2 {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.3;
    background: linear-gradient(to right, #fff, #a5b4fc);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    animation: slideUp 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
}

/* Typewriter Effect */
.typewriter {
    display: inline-block;
    overflow: hidden;
    white-space: nowrap;
    margin: 0;
    width: 0;
    animation: typing 2s steps(11, end) forwards;
    /* 11 chars in "I'm Cherry." */
    -webkit-text-fill-color: var(--text-main);
    /* Override gradient for typing text if needed, or keep gradient */
}

@keyframes typing {
    from {
        width: 0
    }

    to {
        width: 11ch
    }
}

@keyframes slideUp {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }

    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

/* Input Area */
.input-area {
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-left: -18px;
    margin-right: -18px;
    padding-top: 8px;
    padding-bottom: 2px;
    padding-left: 18px;
    padding-right: 18px;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 30;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(21, 29, 54, 0) 0%, rgba(21, 29, 54, 0.94) 28%, rgba(21, 29, 54, 1) 100%);
}

.composer-status {
    display: block;
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    line-height: 1.25;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    opacity: 0.95;
    min-height: 14px;
    padding-left: 0;
}

.input-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    border: none;
    border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(111, 92, 255, 0.95);
    background: var(--composer-bg);
    border-radius: 0;
    padding: 0 0 4px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease;
    width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
    box-shadow: none;
}

.nav-actions {
    display: none;
}

.choice-actions {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    margin: 12px 0 10px;
}

.choice-action-btn {
    appearance: none;
    border: 1px solid rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.35);
    background: rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.12);
    color: #eef2ff;
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font: inherit;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    line-height: 1.2;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease;
}

.choice-action-btn:hover,
.choice-action-btn:focus-visible {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.9), rgba(76, 201, 255, 0.9));
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32);
    outline: none;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.input-wrapper:focus-within {
    border-bottom-color: rgba(140, 124, 255, 1);
}

#user-input {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
    width: 100%;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    font-size: 0.96rem;
    color: #edf1ff;
    font-family: inherit;
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

#user-input::placeholder {
    color: rgba(142, 152, 184, 0.62);
}

.nav-btn,
#send-btn {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
    color: #eef2ff;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0 18px;
    height: 38px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-family: inherit;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    white-space: nowrap;
    min-width: 98px;
    box-shadow: none;
}

.nav-btn:hover,
#send-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.26);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.nav-btn.hidden {
    display: none;
    /* Properly hide it */
}

#back-btn:hover {
    transform: translateX(-5px);
}



/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    body {
        align-items: flex-start;
        overflow: hidden;
        height: 100dvh;
        min-height: 100dvh;
        scrollbar-width: none;
        -ms-overflow-style: none;
    }

    .main-container {
        flex-direction: column;
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 100dvh;
        height: 100dvh;
        max-height: 100dvh;
        gap: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .character-section {
        display: flex !important;
        /* Force show */
        height: 35vh;
        min-height: 200px;
        align-items: flex-end;
        justify-content: center;
        padding-bottom: 0;
        z-index: 1;
        /* Bring it up slightly */
        position: relative;
        pointer-events: none;
        /* Prevent blocking clicks */
    }

    .character-container {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
        /* Allow slightly wider */
        height: 100%;
        /* Fill the section height */
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: flex-end;
    }

    .character-img {
        width: auto;
        height: 100%;
        /* Ensure it fits vertically without cropping */
        max-width: 100%;
        object-fit: contain;
        transform-origin: bottom center;
    }

    .form-interface {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: none;
        flex: 1;
        min-height: 0;
        height: 100%;
        max-height: 100%;
        border-radius: 30px 30px 0 0;
        /* Sheet styling */
        border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
        border-bottom: none;
        padding: 20px;
        background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85);
        backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
        z-index: 10;
        /* Sit on top of character */
        box-shadow: 0 -10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        /* Slightly darker/more opaque on mobile */
    }

    .input-area {
        margin-left: -20px;
        margin-right: -20px;
        padding-left: 20px;
        padding-right: 20px;
    }

    .current-step h2 {
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        /* Readable prompt size */
    }

    #user-input {
        font-size: 16px;
    }

    .form-header {
        margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .input-wrapper {
        gap: 10px;
    }

    /* Ensure buttons are touch-friendly */
    .nav-btn,
    .settings-btn {
        padding: 10px;
    }

    #send-btn {
        height: 36px;
        min-width: 92px;
        padding: 0 16px;
    }
}

/* Brand Footer */
.brand-footer {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 6px;
    margin-bottom: 0;
    padding-top: 4px;
    border-top: none;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 30;
}

.brand-link {
    font-size: 0.74rem;
    color: rgba(152, 163, 199, 0.72);
    text-decoration: none;
    opacity: 0.56;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.brand-link:hover {
    opacity: 1;
    color: var(--text-main);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    /* Subtle expansion hover effect */
}

/* Webhook Toggle */
.webhook-toggle-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    /* Slightly tighter gap for header */
    margin-bottom: 0;
    /* Remove bottom margin */
    margin-left: 0;
    margin-right: 0;
}

.toggle-label {
    display: none;
    /* Hide label on mobile if needed, but keeping for now */
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    /* Smaller for header */
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-weight: 500;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* Show label on larger screens or always? Keeping it. */
@media (max-width: 400px) {
    .toggle-label {
        display: none;
    }
}

.switch {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 36px;
    height: 20px;
}

.switch input {
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
}

.slider {
    position: absolute;
    cursor: pointer;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    transition: .4s;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
}

.slider:before {
    position: absolute;
    content: "";
    height: 14px;
    width: 14px;
    left: 2px;
    bottom: 2px;
    background-color: var(--text-muted);
    transition: .4s;
    border-radius: 50%;
}

input:checked+.slider {
    background-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
    /* Primary color low opacity */
    border-color: var(--primary);
}

input:checked+.slider:before {
    transform: translateX(16px);
    background-color: var(--text-main);
}

/* Rounded sliders */
.slider.round {
    border-radius: 34px;
}

@keyframes hugPulse {
    0% {
        transform: scale(0.94);
    }

    50% {
        transform: scale(1.08);
    }

    100% {
        transform: scale(0.94);
    }
}

@keyframes waveHello {
    0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
    }

    20% {
        transform: rotate(16deg);
    }

    40% {
        transform: rotate(-10deg);
    }

    60% {
        transform: rotate(12deg);
    }

    80% {
        transform: rotate(-6deg);
    }

    100% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
    }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
}

/* Loading Dots Animation */
.loading-dots {
    display: inline-flex;
    gap: 4px;
    align-items: center;
    height: 24px;
}

.dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    background-color: var(--text-main);
    border-radius: 50%;
    opacity: 0.6;
    animation: bounce 1.4s infinite ease-in-out both;
}

.dot:nth-child(1) {
    animation-delay: -0.32s;
}

.dot:nth-child(2) {
    animation-delay: -0.16s;
}

.typing-indicator {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 8px;
}

.typing-bubble {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
}

.typing-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--text-main);
    opacity: 0.85;
    animation: bounce 1.2s infinite ease-in-out both;
}

.typing-dot:nth-child(1) {
    animation-delay: -0.32s;
}

.typing-dot:nth-child(2) {
    animation-delay: -0.16s;
}

.typing-status {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    line-height: 1.25;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    opacity: 0.95;
    white-space: normal;
}


@keyframes bounce {

    0%,
    80%,
    100% {
        transform: scale(0);
    }

    40% {
        transform: scale(1.0);
    }
}


.brand-logo {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    margin-right: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
    color: var(--text-main);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1;
}

.brand-logo img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    display: block;
    object-fit: cover;
}

.brand-logo[hidden] {
    display: none !important;
}

</style>
</head>

<body>

    <div class="background-globes">
        <div class="globe globe-1"></div>
        <div class="globe globe-2"></div>
        <div class="globe globe-3"></div>
    </div>

    <main class="main-container">
        <!-- Conversational Form Interface -->
        <section class="form-interface glass-panel">
            <!-- Character container moved inside chat-layout below -->
            <header class="form-header">
                <div class="brand">
                    <div class="brand-logo" id="brand-logo" hidden aria-hidden="true"></div>
                    <div class="status-dot"></div>
                    <h1>Cherry</h1>
                </div>
                <div class="header-actions">

            return JSON.parse(decodeBase64Utf8(decodeURIComponent(encoded)));
        } catch (error) {
            return null;

    function decodeBase64Utf8(value) {
        const binary = atob(String(value || ''));
        const bytes = Uint8Array.from(binary, (char) => char.charCodeAt(0));

        const webhook = cfg.webhook && typeof cfg.webhook === 'object' ? cfg.webhook : {};
        const converse = normalizeConverseConfig(cfg.converse);

        next.assistantBubbleAnimation = ['pop', 'slide', 'bounce', 'fade', 'none'].includes(String(next.assistantBubbleAnimation || '').trim()) ? String(next.assistantBubbleAnimation || '').trim() : 'none';
        next.userBubbleFontFamily = String(next.userBubbleFontFamily || '').trim();

            return;
        }
        element.animate([{ opacity: 0, transform: 'scale(0.96) translateY(6px)' }, { opacity: 1, transform: 'scale(1) translateY(0)' }], base);
    }

    function applyUserTextAppearance(element) {
        if (!(element instanceof HTMLElement)) return;
        const converse = getConverseConfig();
        element.style.fontFamily = converse.userBubbleFontFamily || '';
        element.style.fontSize = `${Number(converse.userBubbleFontSizePx || 15)}px`;
        if (converse.userBubbleBgColor) {
            element.style.display = 'inline-block';
            element.style.marginTop = '8px';
            element.style.padding = '8px 12px';
            element.style.borderRadius = '14px';
            element.style.background = converse.userBubbleBgColor;
            element.style.color = '#ffffff';
        }
    }

    function buildSteps(cfg) {
        const sourceQuestions = Array.isArray(cfg.questions) && cfg.questions.length ? cfg.questions : DEFAULT_STEPS;
        const mapped = sourceQuestions
            .filter((item) => item && String(item.text || '').trim())
            .map((item, index) => ({
                field: index === 0 ? 'name' : index === 1 ? 'inquiry' : `answer_${index + 1}`,
                question: String(item.text || ''),
                placeholder: 'Type here...',
                type: String(item.type || 'text').trim().toLowerCase() === 'choice' ? 'choice' : 'text',
                choices: String(item.choices || ''),
                displayMode: String(item.displayMode || '').trim().toLowerCase() === 'typewriter' ? 'typewriter' : 'instant'
            }));
        return mapped.length ? mapped : DEFAULT_STEPS.slice();
    }

    function resolveWebhookMode(cfg) {
        const mode = String(cfg.webhook?.activeMode || '').trim().toLowerCase();
        return mode === 'test' || mode === 'chat' ? mode : 'production';
    }

    function resolveWebhookUrl(cfg, mode) {
        const webhook = cfg.webhook || {};
        const productionUrl = String(webhook.url || DEFAULT_WEBHOOKS.production).trim();
        const testUrl = String(webhook.testUrl || DEFAULT_WEBHOOKS.test).trim();
        const chatUrl = String(webhook.chatUrl || DEFAULT_WEBHOOKS.chat).trim();
        if (mode === 'test') return testUrl || productionUrl || chatUrl;
        if (mode === 'chat') return chatUrl || productionUrl || testUrl;
        return productionUrl || chatUrl || testUrl;
    }

    function createInitialFormData() {
        return {
            sessionId: generateSessionId(),
            name: '',
            email: '',
            inquiry: ''
        };
    }

    function createBotMessage() {
        const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
        wrapper.className = 'message-wrapper';

        const avatarDiv = document.createElement('div');
        avatarDiv.className = 'avatar';
        avatarDiv.innerHTML = `<img src="${resolveAvatarUrl()}" alt="${escapeHtml(getAssistantDisplayName())}">`;
        wrapper.appendChild(avatarDiv);

        const stepDiv = document.createElement('div');
        stepDiv.className = 'current-step';
        wrapper.appendChild(stepDiv);

        flowContainer.appendChild(wrapper);
        return stepDiv;
    }

    function getAssistantDisplayName() {
        return String(runtimeConfig?.assistant?.name || runtimeConfig?.header?.title || runtimeConfig?.header?.name || 'Cherry').trim() || 'Cherry';
    }

    function isImageSourceValue(value) {
        const normalized = String(value || '').trim();
        if (!normalized) return false;
        return normalized.startsWith('data:')
            || normalized.startsWith('blob:')
            || /^https?:\/\//i.test(normalized)
            || /\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp|svg)(\?.*)?$/i.test(normalized);
    }

    function resolveAvatarUrl() {
        const header = runtimeConfig?.header && typeof runtimeConfig.header === 'object' ? runtimeConfig.header : {};
        const assistant = runtimeConfig?.assistant && typeof runtimeConfig.assistant === 'object' ? runtimeConfig.assistant : {};
        if (isImageSourceValue(header.avatar)) return String(header.avatar).trim();
        if (String(header.logoType || '').trim().toLowerCase() === 'image' && isImageSourceValue(header.logoUrl)) {
            return String(header.logoUrl).trim();
        }
        if (isImageSourceValue(assistant.avatar)) return String(assistant.avatar).trim();
        return 'assets/character_standin.png';
    }

    function refreshAssistantAvatars() {
        const avatarUrl = resolveAvatarUrl();
        const assistantName = getAssistantDisplayName();
        flowContainer.querySelectorAll('.message-wrapper .avatar img').forEach((img) => {
            img.src = avatarUrl;
            img.alt = assistantName;
        });
    }

    function clearChoiceButtons() {
        if (activeChoiceContainer && activeChoiceContainer.parentNode) {
            activeChoiceContainer.parentNode.removeChild(activeChoiceContainer);
        }
        activeChoiceContainer = null;
    }

    function parseChoiceList(value) {
        return String(value || '')
            .split(',')
            .map((item) => item.trim())
            .filter(Boolean);
    }

    function renderChoiceButtons(stepData) {
        clearChoiceButtons();
        if (!(inputArea instanceof HTMLElement)) return;
        const choices = parseChoiceList(stepData && stepData.choices);
        if (!choices.length) return;

        const container = document.createElement('div');
        container.className = 'choice-actions';
        choices.forEach((choice) => {
            const button = document.createElement('button');
            button.type = 'button';
            button.className = 'choice-action-btn';
            button.textContent = choice;
            button.addEventListener('click', () => {
                handleStepAnswer(choice);
            });
            container.appendChild(button);
        });

        inputArea.insertBefore(container, brandFooter || null);
        activeChoiceContainer = container;
    }

    function renderStep() {
        clearChoiceButtons();
        archiveCurrentStep();

        if (currentStep < steps.length) {
            const stepData = steps[currentStep];
            let questionText = stepData.question;
            if (formData.name) {
                questionText = questionText.replace(/\{name\}/g, formData.name);
            }
            const stepDiv = createBotMessage();
            stepDiv.innerHTML = '<h2></h2>';
            const heading = stepDiv.querySelector('h2');
            if (heading) {
                if (stepData.displayMode === 'typewriter') typeText(heading, questionText);
                else heading.innerHTML = questionText;
            }
            userInput.placeholder = stepData.placeholder;
            userInput.value = '';
            userInput.disabled = false;
            userInput.focus();
            if (stepData.type === 'choice') renderChoiceButtons(stepData);
        } else {
            submitForm();
        }

        scrollToBottom();
    }

    function typeText(element, html, speed = 40) {
        element.innerHTML = html;
        const textNodes = [];
        const walker = document.createTreeWalker(element, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT);
        let node = walker.nextNode();
        while (node) {
            textNodes.push({ node, text: node.nodeValue || '' });
            node.nodeValue = '';
            node = walker.nextNode();
        }

        let nodeIndex = 0;
        let charIndex = 0;

        function type() {
            if (nodeIndex >= textNodes.length) return;
            const current = textNodes[nodeIndex];
            if (charIndex < current.text.length) {
                current.node.nodeValue += current.text.charAt(charIndex);
                charIndex += 1;
                window.setTimeout(type, speed);
                scrollToBottom();
                return;
            }
            nodeIndex += 1;
            charIndex = 0;
            type();
        }

        if (textNodes.length) type();
    }

    function addToHistory(answer) {
        const lastWrapper = flowContainer.lastElementChild;
        if (!lastWrapper) return;
        const activeStep = lastWrapper.querySelector('.current-step') || lastWrapper.querySelector('.history-item');
        if (!activeStep) return;
        const answerSpan = document.createElement('span');
        answerSpan.className = 'history-a';
        answerSpan.textContent = answer;
        activeStep.appendChild(answerSpan);
        applyUserTextAppearance(answerSpan);
    }

    function requestEmail() {
        if (isAskingForEmail) return;
        isAskingForEmail = true;
        const stepDiv = createBotMessage();
        stepDiv.innerHTML = '<h2></h2>';
        const heading = stepDiv.querySelector('h2');
        if (heading) typeText(heading, 'To stay in touch, could you please share your email address?');
        userInput.placeholder = 'Enter your email...';
        userInput.value = '';
        userInput.focus();
        scrollToBottom();
    }

    async function handleNext() {
        const text = String(userInput.value || '').trim();
        if (!text) return;
        handleStepAnswer(text);
    }

    function handleStepAnswer(text) {
        const normalizedText = String(text || '').trim();
        if (!normalizedText) return;
        clearChoiceButtons();
        addToHistory(normalizedText);

        if (isAskingForEmail) {
            formData.email = normalizedText;
            formData.inquiry = `[User provided email: ${normalizedText}]`;
            isAskingForEmail = false;
            archiveCurrentStep();
            userInput.value = '';
            scrollToBottom();
            submitForm();
            return;
        }

        if (currentStep < steps.length) {
            formData[steps[currentStep].field] = normalizedText;
            currentStep += 1;
            userInput.value = '';
            renderStep();
            return;
        }

        archiveCurrentStep();
        formData.inquiry = normalizedText;
        userInput.value = '';
        scrollToBottom();
        submitForm();
    }

    function archiveCurrentStep() {
        const currentWrapper = Array.from(flowContainer.querySelectorAll('.message-wrapper')).find((item) => item.querySelector('.current-step')) || flowContainer.lastElementChild;
        if (currentWrapper) {
            const previousCurrent = currentWrapper.querySelector('.current-step');
            if (previousCurrent) {
                previousCurrent.classList.remove('current-step');
                previousCurrent.classList.add('history-item');
                const heading = previousCurrent.querySelector('h2');
                if (heading) {
                    const question = document.createElement('span');
                    question.className = 'history-q';
                    question.innerHTML = heading.innerHTML;
                    previousCurrent.replaceChild(question, heading);
                }
            }
        }
        pruneHistory();
    }

    function pruneHistory() {
        flowContainer.querySelectorAll('.message-wrapper').forEach((wrapper) => {
            wrapper.style.display = '';
        });
    }

    function buildWebhookPayload() {
        const inquiryText = String(formData.inquiry || '').trim();
        const nameText = String(formData.name || '').trim();
        const primaryText = inquiryText || nameText;
        return {
            ...formData,
            message: primaryText,
            chatInput: primaryText,
            sessionId: formData.sessionId
        };
    }

    async function submitForm() {
        const stepDiv = createBotMessage();
        const converse = getConverseConfig();
        const delayMs = Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(converse.statusDelaySec || 0) * 1000));
        const minVisibleMs = Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(converse.minVisibleSec || 0) * 1000));
        let typingShownAt = 0;
        let typingShown = false;
        let responseSettled = false;
        let typingDelayTimer = 0;
        const renderTyping = () => {
            stepDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="typing-indicator"><div class="typing-bubble"><span class="typing-dot"></span><span class="typing-dot"></span><span class="typing-dot"></span></div><div class="typing-status"></div></div>';
            const indicator = stepDiv.querySelector('.typing-indicator');
            const status = stepDiv.querySelector('.typing-status');
            const dots = stepDiv.querySelectorAll('.typing-dot');
            applyAssistantBubbleAppearance(stepDiv);
            if (indicator instanceof HTMLElement) {
                indicator.style.display = 'flex';
                indicator.style.flexDirection = 'column';
                indicator.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
                indicator.style.gap = '8px';
            }
            const bubble = stepDiv.querySelector('.typing-bubble');
            if (bubble instanceof HTMLElement) {
                bubble.style.display = 'inline-flex';
                bubble.style.alignItems = 'center';
                bubble.style.gap = '6px';
                bubble.style.padding = '12px 14px';
                bubble.style.borderRadius = converse.bubbleShape === 'pill' ? '999px' : converse.bubbleShape === 'sharp' ? '12px' : '16px';
                bubble.style.background = resolveFillBackground(converse.bubbleFill, converse.bubbleBgColor, converse.bubbleGradientEnd || converse.bubbleBgColor);
                if (converse.bubbleFill === 'outline') bubble.style.border = `1px solid ${converse.bubbleBgColor}`;
                if (converse.bubbleFill === 'glass') {
                    bubble.style.backdropFilter = 'blur(10px)';
                    bubble.style.webkitBackdropFilter = 'blur(10px)';
                }
            }
            if (status instanceof HTMLElement) {
                status.textContent = getConverseTypingText();
                status.style.fontSize = '11px';
                status.style.lineHeight = '1.25';
                status.style.color = converse.indicatorColor || '#94a3b8';
                status.style.opacity = '0.95';
                status.style.whiteSpace = 'normal';
            }
            dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                if (!(dot instanceof HTMLElement)) return;
                dot.style.width = '8px';
                dot.style.height = '8px';
                dot.style.borderRadius = '50%';
                dot.style.background = converse.indicatorColor || '#94a3b8';
                dot.style.opacity = '0.85';
                dot.style.animation = converse.animation === 'none'
                    ? 'none'
                    : (converse.animation === 'pulse' ? 'bounce 1.4s infinite ease-in-out both' : converse.animation === 'wave' ? 'bounce 1s infinite ease-in-out both' : 'bounce 1.2s infinite ease-in-out both');
                dot.style.animationDelay = converse.animation === 'none' ? '0s' : `${index * 0.16}s`;
            });
            typingShown = true;
            typingShownAt = Date.now();
        };
        if (converse.typingEnabled) {
            if (delayMs === 0) {
                setComposerStatus('');
                renderTyping();
            } else {
                stepDiv.innerHTML = '';
                typingDelayTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
                    if (!typingShown && !responseSettled && stepDiv.isConnected) {
                        setComposerStatus('');
                        renderTyping();
                    }
                    typingDelayTimer = 0;
                }, delayMs);
            }
        } else {
            stepDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="loading-dots"><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div></div>';
        }
        scrollToBottom();
        userInput.disabled = true;
        userInput.placeholder = 'Please wait...';

        try {
            const headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' };
            if (runtimeConfig.previewAuth?.enabled && runtimeConfig.previewAuth?.headerName && runtimeConfig.previewAuth?.headerValue) {
                headers[String(runtimeConfig.previewAuth.headerName)] = String(runtimeConfig.previewAuth.headerValue);
            }
            const response = await fetch(currentWebhookUrl, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers,
                body: JSON.stringify(buildWebhookPayload())
            });
            if (!response.ok) {
                throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
            }
            const responseText = await response.text();
            const botReply = parseReply(responseText, response.headers.get('content-type') || '');
            responseSettled = true;
            setComposerStatus('');
            if (typingDelayTimer) {
                window.clearTimeout(typingDelayTimer);
                typingDelayTimer = 0;
            }
            if (typingShown && minVisibleMs > 0) {
                const elapsed = Date.now() - typingShownAt;
                if (elapsed < minVisibleMs) {
                    await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, minVisibleMs - elapsed));
                }
            }
            stepDiv.innerHTML = `<h2>${botReply}</h2>`;
            applyAssistantBubbleAppearance(stepDiv);
            animateAssistantBubble(stepDiv);
            revealAssistantReply(stepDiv);
        } catch (error) {
            responseSettled = true;
            setComposerStatus('');
            if (typingDelayTimer) {
                window.clearTimeout(typingDelayTimer);
                typingDelayTimer = 0;
            }
            if (typingShown && minVisibleMs > 0) {
                const elapsed = Date.now() - typingShownAt;
                if (elapsed < minVisibleMs) {
                    await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, minVisibleMs - elapsed));
                }
            }
            stepDiv.innerHTML = `<h2>Error: ${error.message}</h2>`;
            applyAssistantBubbleAppearance(stepDiv);
            animateAssistantBubble(stepDiv);
            revealAssistantReply(stepDiv);
        } finally {
            setComposerStatus('');
            userInput.disabled = false;
            userInput.placeholder = 'Type here...';
            userInput.focus();
        }
    }

    function parseReply(rawText, contentType) {
        const fallback = 'Thank you for reaching out.';
        const text = String(rawText || '').trim();
        if (!text) return fallback;
        const looksJson = String(contentType || '').toLowerCase().includes('application/json') || text.startsWith('{') || text.startsWith('[');
        if (!looksJson) return text;
        try {
            return extractReply(JSON.parse(text)) || fallback;
        } catch (error) {
            return text;
        }
    }

    function extractReply(payload) {
        if (payload == null) return '';
        if (typeof payload === 'string') return payload.trim();
        if (typeof payload === 'number' || typeof payload === 'boolean') return String(payload);
        if (Array.isArray(payload)) {
            for (const item of payload) {
                const reply = extractReply(item);
                if (reply) return reply;
            }
            return '';
        }
        if (typeof payload === 'object') {
            const directKeys = ['output', 'text', 'message', 'reply', 'response', 'content', 'answer'];
            for (const key of directKeys) {
                if (typeof payload[key] === 'string' && payload[key].trim()) {
                    return payload[key].trim();
                }
            }
            const nestedKeys = ['data', 'result', 'body', 'payload', 'item', 'items'];
            for (const key of nestedKeys) {
                if (payload[key] !== undefined) {
                    const reply = extractReply(payload[key]);
                    if (reply) return reply;
                }
            }
        }
        return '';
    }

    function scrollToBottom() {
        if (pendingScrollTimer) {
            window.clearTimeout(pendingScrollTimer);
        }
        pendingScrollTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
            const scrollHost = scrollRegion || flowContainer;
            scrollHost.scrollTop = scrollHost.scrollHeight;
            pendingScrollTimer = 0;
        }, 400);
    }

    function revealAssistantReply(stepDiv) {
        if (pendingScrollTimer) {
            window.clearTimeout(pendingScrollTimer);
            pendingScrollTimer = 0;
        }
        window.setTimeout(() => {
            if (stepDiv instanceof HTMLElement) {
                stepDiv.scrollTop = 0;
            }
        }, 60);
    }

    function restart() {
        currentStep = 0;
        isAskingForEmail = false;
        formData.sessionId = generateSessionId();
        formData.name = '';
        formData.email = '';
        formData.inquiry = '';
        flowContainer.innerHTML = '';
        renderStep();
    }

    function generateSessionId() {
        return `sess-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 11)}`;
    }

    function downloadChat() {
        let transcript = 'Chat Transcript - Cherry\n\n';
        flowContainer.querySelectorAll('.history-item').forEach((item) => {
            const question = item.querySelector('.history-q');
            const answer = item.querySelector('.history-a');
            if (question) transcript += `Cherry: ${question.innerText.replace(/\n/g, ' ')}\n`;
            if (answer) transcript += `You: ${answer.innerText.replace(/\n/g, ' ')}\n`;
            transcript += '\n';
        });
        const current = flowContainer.querySelector('.current-step h2');
        if (current && current.innerText) {
            transcript += `Cherry: ${current.innerText.replace(/\n/g, ' ')}\n`;
        }
        const blob = new Blob([transcript], { type: 'text/plain' });
        const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const link = document.createElement('a');
        link.href = url;
        link.download = `chat-transcript-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.txt`;
        document.body.appendChild(link);
        link.click();
        document.body.removeChild(link);
        window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    }
});

</script>
</body>
